title: QIFU Champagne Gold Heart Balloons 12 Pack, Gold Love Heart Balloons Valentines Balloon with White Ribbon, Helium Foil Hearts Balloon for Romantic Valentines Decorations Anniversary Engagement Wedding
features: 💛Valentines Day Decorations -- The champagne gold heart balloons package include 12pcs 18inch heart shaped foil balloons + 1 roll white ribbon + 1 inflation straw. We provide enough heart shape balloons to hold a perfect Valentine's Day party and are equipped with two tools to make decoration easier.

💛High Quality -- Our foil hearts balloons are made of high quality aluminum foil, which is non-toxic and harmless. Besides, our heart balloons helium are thicker and more sturdy. Women and children can also use it with confidence.

💛Wide Application -- Gold heart balloon will perfectly decorate your party with a wonderful atmosphere, surprising your loved ones on valentine’s day, engagement, anniversary, wedding, girlfriend birthday, Mother's Day, bridal shower, baby shower or other occasions!

💛Easy To Use -- The love heart balloons can be inflated with air or helium without any skill. And it is self-sealing, which is easy and convenient to decorate your party with the ribbon and straw we provide. Please Inflate up to 90% or the balloons will burst.

💛Provide Quality Service -- QIFU is a brand that focuses on balloon party decoration, gender reveal party, birthday party and other events activities. Our balloon have sufficient quantity colour and style to meet your various needs, please do not overinflate the balloon, so as not to burst, sincerely hope to spend every important moment with you and your family.
